decisions.choice: Fixed grep flag from -qiE to -qi in GAP_FIELDS test
decisions.reason: The test was using extended regex flag (-E) with basic regex escape syntax (\|), which treats \| as a literal pipe character rather than an OR operator. Changed to basic regex (-qi without -E) so \| correctly functions as OR.

decisions.choice: Organized as five phase sections with subsections for mechanisms, calculations, and patterns
decisions.reason: Matches the standardized producer pattern structure while providing comprehensive coverage of adaptive interview requirements from architecture
